text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Agnes Digital and I<n>head to the
photo book release event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King and her entourage are so<n>amazing! They
really know how to<n>land a joke!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I would've been perfectly happy just<n>seeing the
three of them perform live,<n>but we're being
blessed with a talk<n>session too?! I gotta send a
letter of<n>thanks to the organizer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hi, Digital. Do you have a second?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwah! K-King?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have something I'd like to ask you.<n>Would you
mind coming over here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For reeeeal?! You want me tostand in?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It appears that a member of King<n>Halo's
entourage isn't feeling too<n>well, so she's asked
Agnes Digital to<n>sub in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-there's no way that... that I can<n>take on such a
big role...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But surely you know all the songs,<n>given that
you're always showing up<n>to support my
performances.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I'm not prepared. What<n>happens if I get up
there and soil your<n>glorious event?!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I get what she's saying, King. It isa big ask to spring on someone out ofnowhere.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Then, does that mean... we're<n>going to have
to cancel?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Twitch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Are you just going to ignore your oshi in her time
of need?

Are you just going to ignore your oshi in her time
of need?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No! Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King! If you're really okay with me,<n>then... please,
let me sub in!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wonderful!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Remember, the stage up there is<n>mine! All you
need to do is enjoy<n>yourself as much as possible!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the mini concert begins with<n>Agnes Digital
performing in perfect<n>sync with King Halo and her
entourage.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The audience is enjoying the<n>performance.
Midway through, the<n>music changes to an
instrumental<n>section, and I catch Agnes Digital's
eye. She looks as if she wants me to<n>do
something...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're so kind to cheer for me! I<n>wasn't even
supposed to be up here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...But you don't have to worry about<n>me. A concert
is where you show<n>your love to your faves.
Surely, your<n>cheers should be aimed elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So don't hold back, everyone! Give a<n>big shout
and pack it full of all your<n>love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ready... GO!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: KING HALOOO!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Very well, I shall grace you<n>with a reply
just as good!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following that, King Halo puts on a<n>performance
that gets the audience<n>even more hyped!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good job getting the crowd going,<n>Digital. I truly
appreciate it, really. I'll<n>give you a proper thanks
on a later<n>date.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Pheeeeew... I'm so glad the mini<n>concert went
well.
choice_data_list: You did a great job handling the crowd!
You did a great job handling the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been practicing my crowd work<n>for a while
since I figured one day I<n>might have a chance to
do a winning<n>concert.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even when I'm on the stage, I want<n>to make my
Umas shine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And don't think I didn't notice you<n>cheering like a
pro out there. With you<n>in the audience, I probably
have<n>nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With you in the crowd and me on<n>stage, we can
hype up Umamusume<n>together!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King! We can't wait any longer! Let's<n>give them
what they want!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, if you insist! What's my<n>naaame?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's more resonant than anything<n>else?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: King's beautiful and resplendent<n>voice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Tell me about this stage!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's blindingly brilliant! King is more<n>suited to the
spotlight than anyone<n>else!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm the definitive<n>first-rate
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! We're just getting started!<n>Submit
yourselves to my intoxicating<n>charm!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You were the perfect substitute,<n>Digital. I truly
appreciate your help,<n>really. I'll give you a proper
thanks on<n>a later date.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Swoon... I got a compliment fromKing... From now on, I'm recognizingtoday as King Halo Day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't think I didn't notice you during<n>the King
Commendation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, all of the fans came here<n>anticipating an
experience only King<n>and her entourage could
provide!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And... now I know I can trust you to<n>lead the
cheers from the stands at my<n>own winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With you in the crowd and me on<n>stage, we can
hype up Umamusume<n>together!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I turn on the light sticks that Agnes<n>Digital left with
me and hold them up<n>in both hands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, what a beautiful sea of light!<n>Okay,
everyone, let's paint the<n>audience in the color of
King!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All the lights in the crowd change<n>immediately,
reflecting King Halo's<n>colors.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow, isn't that beautiful!<n>Everyone's
consideration is truly<n>wonderful.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In which case, I'll have to respond in<n>kind!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following that, King Halo caters to her<n>fans
making them even more hyped!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good job getting the crowd going,<n>Digital. I truly
appreciate it, really. I'll<n>give you a proper thanks
on a later<n>date.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wheeew... It looks like we were able<n>to preserve
King's honor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I should be saying that to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I could see from the stage the<n>emotion you put into
waving your light<n>sticks!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I felt your desire to show your oshi<n>the most
spectacular view!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And... now I know I can trust you to<n>lead the
cheers from the stands at my<n>own winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With you in the crowd and me on<n>stage, we can
hype up Umamusume<n>together!
